payload: {id:'7ttN3TmD7M',cs:50,ce:[[{v:7},,,,,,{v:1}],[,,,,,,],[,,,,,,],[,,,,,,],[,,,,,,],[,,,{v:2},,,],[{v:2},,,,,,{v:4}]],ca:[{v:'title: The Blue Square'},{v:'author: Adem Jaziri'},{v:'rules: Fill the grid such that each row, column, and orthogonally-connected 7-cell region contains the digits 1-7 with no repeats. The regions must be determined by the solver. The sum of the digits along a blue line must be the same within each region the line passes through.  Eg if r2r3r4c6 were in one region and r5r6c6 were in a separate region, then the sum of the digits in r2r3r4c6 = the sum of the digits in r5r6c6. Adjacent digits on a green line must have a difference of at least 4.'}],l:[{wp:[[0.5,6.5],[0.5,0.5],[6.5,0.5],[6.5,6.5],[0.5,6.5]],c:34BBE6,th:8},{wp:[[1.5,5.5],[5.5,5.5]],c:34BBE6,th:8},{wp:[[1.5,0.5],[0.5,1.5]],c:A3E048,th:8},{wp:[[5.5,0.5],[6.5,1.5]],c:A3E048,th:8},{wp:[[1.5,1.5],[2.5,1.5]],c:A3E048,th:8},{wp:[[2.5,3.5],[2.5,4.5]],c:A3E048,th:8},{wp:[[3.5,4.5],[4.5,4.5]],c:A3E048,th:8},{c:A3E048,th:8}],vd:[{id:'ud1FmESQ_0g',publishedAt:'2023-02-02T20:30:08Z',t:'The 7x7 \'Blue\' Square',d:0}]}
